creator: nabijaczleweli@nabijaczleweli.xyz
text:
Furthermore, /just above the segment you quoted/, POSIX.1-2008 says:
    To remove duplicate lines based on whether
    they collate equally instead of whether they are identical,
    applications should use:
        sort -u
    instead of:
        sort | uniq

Which, again, reinforces that uniq checks for the lines being identical, and isn't influenced by collation.
